name: Crunchy Taco Chip Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart casserole dish, arrange the chicken breasts with thicker parts toward the outside of the dish. Cover and microwave on high for 8-10 minutes, until the chicken is thoroughly cooked. Remove the chicken to a plate and set aside.
2. In the same casserole dish, combine the scallions (onions), pepper, celery, and margarine. Microwave on high for 3-4 minutes, stirring once, until the vegetables are tender. Add the tomatoes; microwave on high for 5-7 minutes, until slightly thickened.
3. Arrange the chicken on top of the tomato mixture. Sprinkle evenly with coarsely crushed taco chips, cheese, and olives. Microwave on high for 2 minutes, until the cheese melts.
Serve with rice and a salad. Each serving provides: 1 fat, 2 1/2 proteins, 2 vegetables, 1/2 bread. Per serving: 351 calories.
